title: ScoringProfile
description: Scoring profile for job offer ranking

primary.description: Technologies that gate and drive the tech dimension score

secondary.description: Nice-to-have technologies that earn bonus points

preference.description: Ordered list of preferred work modes (rank 0 = most preferred)

city.description: Default allowed cities (used when no per-mode override is set)
Allowed cities for hybrid offers (overrides location.city)

remote_days_min_per_week.description: Minimum acceptable remote days per week for hybrid

city.description: Allowed cities for on-site offers (overrides location.city)

unknown_primary_required.description: Points deducted per unknown required technology in the offer

preference_rank_step.description: Points deducted per rank position away from most preferred mode

not_in_preference.description: Points deducted when offer mode is absent from preference list

city_not_allowed.description: Points deducted when offer city is not in the allowed list

secondary_match.description: Bonus when offer secondary technologies overlap with profile secondary

secondary_on_primary_match.description: Bonus when profile secondary technologies appear in offer primary

technology.description: Weight of the technology dimension in the final score

location_mode.description: Weight of the location mode dimension in the final score

location_city.description: Weight of the location city dimension in the final score
